strengths: Strong backend/distributed systems experience with high-scale microservices and low-latency systems (e.g., Dunnhumby, National Instruments)
Hands-on involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven ability to ship production-grade systems across full stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang) and scale teams (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in commercial environments (no clear examples of regulated financial systems)
Minimal evidence of multi-agent AI systems in production (current roles focus on AI-agent infrastructure but not clear operational deployment)
No demonstrated experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ engineers or developing senior technical leadership layers
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems and backend engineering depth, including high-scale microservices and low-latency applications, but lacks direct experience in fintech infrastructure, agentic AI in production, or scaling engineering teams to the required size. His current role involves AI-agent tooling rather than commercial deployment, and his fintech exposure is minimal. While technically skilled, the gaps in core domain requirements for this role are significant.
